content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use a `do-while` loop to repeatedly prompt the user until a valid month number (between 1 and 12) is entered.

When executed, the code will prompt the user to enter a number. Based on the input, it will display:

sampleTestCases.output:
Invalid month! Please try again.
Invalid month! Please try again.
Month number accepted: 10
